question: What best describes the change in the defect rate from 2012 to 2022?

options.A: There was a large surge in the defect rate
options.B: The trend in the defect rate is unclear from this chart
options.C: There was a modest upward trend within a narrow range
options.D: The defect rate stayed exactly the same throughout

explanation: The y-axis uses a very tight range (5.44–5.74%) instead of a more informative 0–10% context, which visually exaggerates variability. The actual net change is about 0.30% over the period, which is modest in the full context.
